title: CommunityTemplateData
description: JSON schema for TemplateCommunityPage.tsx — the editorial-quality community profile page. Every field is annotated with its render status, the exact UI section it feeds, and data sourcing notes. Fields are ordered to match the visual layout top-to-bottom.
x-page-layout: 1. HERO — PageHero with background image, breadcrumbs, location badges
2. KPI CARDS — 4 floating cards overlapping hero (HeroKpiCards component)
3. BENTO GRID — 12-column grid containing all content sections:
3a. NARRATIVE (8-col) — editorial text with tabbed paragraphs + feature pills
3c. DEMOGRAPHICS (4-col sidebar) — 'At a Glance' stats + quick market stats + CTAs
3d. EXPLORE MAP (12-col) — Leaflet map with 4-tab sidebar (listings/dining/trails/golf)
3e. SIGNATURE AMENITY (12-col) — full-width split card (text + image)
3g. KEY DISTANCES (4-col) — drive times to key destinations
3h. QUALITY OF LIFE (4-col) — 6-metric grid with icons
4. FEATURED LISTING — hero-style spotlight for listings[0]
5. LISTING GRID — paginated 3-column carousel of all listings

id.x-usage: Used in 6 URL constructions: breadcrumb path, listing filter, market-intel link, browse listings, view listings CTA, listing detail CTA

name.x-usage: Most-used field — appears in 7+ locations. SEO title format: '{name} Homes for Sale | {city}, Phoenix'

tagline.description: Short tagline — used as both the narrative heading AND the SEO meta description
tagline.x-usage: Narrative heading: '{tagline} — {city}'. Also passed to placeSchema() for structured data.

description.description: 1-2 sentence summary. Currently NOT rendered by the page — the SEO description uses 'tagline' instead. Reserved for future use (e.g. social sharing, search results).
examples: Desert Mountain is the crown jewel of North Scottsdale luxury...
description.x-notes: Present in the TypeScript interface but never accessed in JSX. Consider using this as the SEO description instead of tagline.

oneOf.description: Legacy format: paragraphs separated by \n\n. Auto-split into 3 tabs: Legacy, Lifestyle, The Homes.
Structured format with explicit lead paragraph and named tabs.

lead.description: Opening paragraph rendered with drop-cap. Sets the tone for the community.

sections.description: Narrative tabs. Each section has a tab name and multi-paragraph content (\n\n separated).

tab.description: Tab label displayed in the narrative tab bar.

content.description: Tab content. Multiple paragraphs separated by \n\n. Minimum 250 words per tab recommended.

narrative.description: Community narrative. Supports two formats: (1) legacy string with \n\n-separated paragraphs auto-split into 3 tabs, or (2) structured object with explicit lead + named tab sections. Structured format preferred for new communities. Minimum 750 words total (1000+ for ultra-luxury).
narrative.x-notes: Tab labels are data-driven from sections[].tab. Structured format allows custom tab names per community.

heroImage.description: URL for the full-width hero background image. Recommended: 2400px wide, landscape orientation.

elevation.description: Elevation display string shown in the hero location badge
elevation.x-usage: Rendered as: '{elevation} Elevation' with Compass icon

zipCode.description: Primary ZIP code for the community
zipCode.x-usage: Rendered as: '{city}, AZ {zipCode}' with MapPin icon

coordinates.description: [latitude, longitude] center point. NOT rendered — the Explore Map uses exploreData.center instead. Reserved for geocoding/distance calculations.
coordinates.x-notes: In TypeScript interface but never accessed in JSX. Consider removing from interface or using as exploreData.center fallback.

stats.description: Market summary statistics shown in the sidebar 'At a Glance' card below demographics

priceRange.description: Price range display. NOT rendered — present in interface but never accessed in JSX.

avgPpsf.description: Average PPSF. NOT rendered — present in interface but never accessed in JSX.

avgDom.description: Average days on market. NOT rendered — present in interface but never accessed in JSX.

inventory.description: Active listing count shown in the 'Browse N Listings' CTA button

metrics.description: KPI cards displayed as floating cards overlapping the hero. Rendered by HeroKpiCards component. Typically exactly 4 items (2x2 grid on mobile, 1x4 on desktop).

label.description: KPI label in small uppercase text

numericValue.description: Numeric equivalent for sorting/animation. NOT rendered — reserved for future AnimatedCounter integration.

suffix.description: Unit suffix. NOT rendered — reserved for future AnimatedCounter integration.

trend.description: Trend text shown with arrow icon, colored by trendDir

description.description: Subtext below the value in small gray text

features.description: Feature tags rendered as uppercase pill badges in the narrative section

amenities.description: Simple amenity name list. NOT rendered — present in TypeScript interface but never accessed in JSX. Use 'features' for pill display or 'signatureAmenity' for the spotlight card.

lifestyleFeatures.description: Lifestyle feature cards with icons and images. NOT rendered — not in the TypeScript interface. Reserved for a future lifestyle section.

gallery.description: Auto-rotating gallery in the sidebar (4-col). Rotates every 4 seconds. Hidden if empty or first item has no URL. Shows photo count badge.
gallery.x-behavior: Auto-rotates every 4s. Click dots to navigate. Guard: gallery.length > 0 && gallery[0].url

caption.description: Caption shown over the image (serif font)

category.description: Category label shown in gold above the caption

demographics.description: 6 demographic stats in the sidebar 'At a Glance' card. All values are display strings (pre-formatted).

qualityOfLife.description: Quality of life metrics shown in a 2-column grid with icons. Typically 6 items (fills 3 rows).

metric.description: Metric label in tiny uppercase text

score.description: Numeric score 0-100. NOT rendered — reserved for future progress bar or color intensity.

icon.description: Lucide icon name. Resolved via ICON_MAP at runtime. Falls back to Activity if not found.

color.description: Tailwind color name. NOT rendered — icon uses gray-400 regardless. Reserved for future colored icons.

schools.description: Nearby schools. Only the first 4 are displayed in a 2x2 grid.

rating.description: Rating displayed as '{rating}/10' in emerald badge

students.description: Student count. NOT rendered — bonus data for future detail view.

highlight.description: School highlight/award. NOT rendered — bonus data for future detail view.

restaurants.description: Nearby restaurants. Only the first 4 are displayed in a 2x2 grid with thumbnail images.

distance.description: Drive time in small gray text

rating.description: Rating displayed with gold star icon

image.description: Thumbnail image (64x64px display). Scales on hover.

location.description: Venue/location name. NOT rendered — bonus data for future detail view.

priceRange.description: Price range. NOT rendered — bonus data.

highlight.description: Restaurant highlight. NOT rendered — bonus data.

employers.description: Major employers displayed in a 4-column grid within the Economy section.
x-page-sections: Economy — Major Employers (8-col within 12-col dark band)

employees.description: Employee count in gold bold text

distance.description: Distance from community. NOT rendered — bonus data.

economicStats.description: Economic indicator stats in a 2x2 grid within the Economy section. Typically 4 items.
x-page-sections: Economy — Economic Indicators (4-col within 12-col dark band)

benchmark.description: Benchmark comparison. NOT rendered — present in interface but never accessed in JSX.

airports.description: Two airports displayed in the Air Travel bento card — private/executive and commercial.

private.description: Private/executive airport. Name rendered bold, type in gold uppercase, distance as large serif text.

commercial.description: Commercial airport. Same layout as private but type uses gray color instead of gold.

keyDistances.description: Drive times to key destinations. All items rendered in a vertical list.

time.description: Drive time in large serif text

miles.description: Distance in miles. NOT rendered — bonus data.

signatureAmenity.description: Full-width split card spotlighting the community's signature amenity. Left side: icon badge, title, description text, and 2x2 stat grid. Right side: full-bleed image.

icon.description: Lucide icon name for the badge. Only these 4 are supported by the component's conditional rendering.

title.description: Amenity title (serif h3) and image alt text

description.description: Description text in white/60 opacity. Supports multi-paragraph but renders as single block (no \n\n splitting).
description.x-notes: Unlike 'narrative', this does NOT split into tabs. Full text renders inline.

stats.description: Stat highlights in a 2-column grid. Typically 4 items.

image.description: Full-width image (7/12 cols on desktop, 100% height). Hidden if empty/null.

listings.description:
Property listings used in two sections:
1. FEATURED LISTING: listings[0] gets a hero-style spotlight (guard: length > 0 && [0].img)
2. LISTING GRID: all listings in a paginated 3-per-page carousel (guard: length > 1)
The featured listing displays address without house number (address.split(' ').slice(1).join(' ')).

id.description: Unique ID. Used as React key and in listing detail link (/listing/{id}).

price.description: Formatted price in large serif text

ppsf.description: Price per sqft shown below price in grid cards

beds.description: Bedroom count. Featured: '{beds}BD / {baths}BA'. Grid: icon + count.

sqft.description: Square footage. Formatted with toLocaleString() (e.g. 5,430 SF).

address.description: Full street address. Featured listing strips house number for the headline: address.split(' ').slice(1).join(' ').
address.x-notes: Featured: '1024 Desert Vista Dr' → 'Desert Vista Dr' as h3

status.description: Status badge in listing grid cards. Color varies: Active=white, Pending=gold, Coming Soon=navy.

img.description: Listing photo URL. Featured listing uses as hero (700px tall). Grid uses 4:3 aspect ratio.

exploreData.description: Interactive Leaflet map with data-driven tab sidebar. Hidden if center is [0,0]. Tabs are dynamic — only tabs present in the tabs[] array are shown. Each tab has a scrollable item list + map pins with popups. Community boundary polygon overlaid when boundary=true.
x-page-sections: Explore the Area (12-col full-width map section)

center.description: [lat, lng] map center. Set [0, 0] to hide the entire Explore section.

zoom.description: Initial map zoom level. 13 is typical for community-scale view.

tabs.description: Dynamic map tabs. Each tab defines a category of points of interest. Only tabs with data appear. Common keys: listings, dining, trails, golf, shopping, fitness, parks.

key.description: Unique tab identifier. Maps to TAB_ICON_MAP for icon selection. Known keys: listings, dining, trails, golf, shopping, fitness, parks.

label.description: Display label shown in tab button and overlay.

desc.description: Short description shown below the label in the tab button.

markerColor.description: Hex color for map teardrop markers and the count badge dot.

items.description: Points of interest for this tab. All items share common fields (id, name, coords). Type-specific fields are optional and drive conditional rendering in sidebar and popup.

name.description: Name shown in sidebar and popup

boundary.description: When true, the explore map fetches the community boundary polygon from /luxury-communities.geojson by matching the community id/slug. Renders as a gold dashed polygon overlay.
boundary.x-notes: Polygon data is NOT embedded in the community JSON — it lives in the GeoJSON file due to size (thousands of coordinate points per polygon).

section.description: Lifestyle section/category slug. Maps to the sections entity in the v9 schema. Used for section-based filtering on the communities page and for fallback hero images.
section.x-notes: Will drive section-based filtering, hero image fallback, and category badges when UI is wired.

gating.description: Human-readable description of the community's access/security model.
examples: Private guard-gated, individual villages also gated
gating.x-notes: Future: renders in a security/privacy card or FAQ. Used to auto-generate FAQs.

categoryTags.description: Display-ready category tags for filtering and badge display. Different from 'features' (which are community-specific highlights) — these are standardized categories shared across communities.
categoryTags.x-notes: Future: filter chips on communities page, category badges on cards. These are the taxonomy, 'features' are freeform.

website.description: Official community or club website URL.
website.x-notes: Future: external link in sidebar or footer. Also used in placeSchema structured data.

priceRange.description: Full price range including lot/homesite pricing. More detailed than stats.priceRange which is just resale homes. Includes context like '(homesites)' qualifier.
priceRange.x-notes: Future: hero subtitle or sidebar display. Used to auto-generate FAQ answer about pricing.

hoa.description: HOA fee details for the community. Includes both raw description and parsed numeric fields.
hoa.x-notes: Future: HOA card in sidebar or bento grid. Used to auto-generate FAQ about HOA costs.

raw.description: Full human-readable HOA description with all caveats and context.

monthlyLow.description: Low end of monthly HOA range in dollars.

monthlyHigh.description: High end of monthly HOA range in dollars.

hasCapitalFee.description: Whether there is a one-time capital/enhancement fee at closing.

membership.description: Club membership details (for communities with private clubs). Null/absent for communities without club memberships.
membership.x-notes: Future: membership card/section. Key selling point for golf communities.

waitlist.description: Whether there is currently a waitlist for membership.

golf.description: Golf course details for golf communities. Null for non-golf communities. Contains both a pipe-delimited summary and structured course data.
golf.x-notes: Future: golf section with course carousel/comparison. ~11/133 communities have golf data. Used to auto-generate FAQ.

description.description: Pipe-delimited summary of all courses and key facts.

courses.description: Individual course records with structured data.

recognition.description: Awards and recognitions as a single string. Null if no awards. Period-separated list of accolades.
examples: Robb Report 'Best Golf Community in the World.' Platinum Club of America...
recognition.x-notes: Future: awards badge/ribbon section. Only ~1/133 communities have this currently.

notable.description: Key facts and notable statistics about the community. Period-separated list of bullet-point-style facts.
examples: 8,300 acres across 35 distinctive villages. Elevation of ~3,000 ft provides cooler temps...
notable.x-notes: Future: 'Did You Know' sidebar card or fact highlights section.

schoolDistrict.description: School district assignment details. Complements the 'schools' array (which lists nearby schools) — this identifies the actual assigned district.
schoolDistrict.x-notes: Future: school district card with direct link. Used to auto-generate FAQ.

proximity.description: Named drive-time distances to key landmarks. More structured than 'keyDistances' (which is display-only). Provides machine-readable named access for known landmarks.
proximity.x-notes: Future: structured data for local business schema. Complements keyDistances[] for display.

fashionSquare.description: Drive time to Fashion Square / Old Town.

nearestTrail.description: Nearest hiking/biking trail. Null if no trail data. Provides coordinates for map marker and access type for display.
nearestTrail.x-notes: Future: trail spotlight card. Coordinates can add a dedicated trail pin to the explore map.

structuredAmenities.description: Detailed amenity records with addresses, coordinates, URLs, access levels, and tags. These are the full-detail versions of the simple 'amenities' string array. Each record represents a specific facility (golf course, clubhouse, spa, trail, etc.).
structuredAmenities.x-notes: Future: amenity detail cards, amenity map pins, amenity-centric pages. Maps 1:1 to the v9 amenities entity for DB migration.

tags.description: Categorization tags for filtering. Common: golf, dining, spa, pool, fitness, tennis, hiking, family.

url.description: Official website URL. Null if unavailable.

access.description: Access level: public (anyone), residents (HOA), members-only (club), membership-required (purchasable).

faqs.description: Frequently asked questions for FAQ structured data (FAQPage schema) and on-page FAQ accordion. Drives Google rich result snippets. Questions should target long-tail search queries.
faqs.x-notes: Future: FAQ accordion section + FAQPage JSON-LD structured data. High SEO value — targets 'People Also Ask' results.

question.description: Question targeting a long-tail search query. Should start with How/What/Is/Does.
examples: How much are HOA fees at Desert Mountain?

answer.description: Comprehensive answer (2-4 sentences). Include specific numbers and facts for SEO value.
examples: HOA fees at Desert Mountain range from $200 to $500 per month...

relatedCommunities.description: Related/nearby luxury communities for internal linking. Provides cross-selling and improves SEO through internal link equity. Typically 3 communities in the same region or price tier.
relatedCommunities.x-notes: Future: 'Similar Communities' carousel at page bottom. Critical for internal linking SEO strategy.

recentSales.description: Recently sold properties in the community. Provides market transparency and shows real transaction activity. Sorted most-recent first.
recentSales.x-notes: Future: 'Recent Sales' table or timeline. High value for buyer due-diligence and SEO (transaction data).

originalPrice.description: Original list price for price-reduction context.

priceHistory.description: Annual price history for trend visualization. Typically 5 years of data. Used for line charts showing price appreciation over time.
priceHistory.x-notes: Future: price history line chart. Demonstrates long-term value appreciation — key for buyer confidence.

totalSales.description: Total number of closed sales that year.

testimonials.description: Resident testimonials/reviews. Supports Google Review structured data. Typically 3 testimonials for a balanced section.
testimonials.x-notes: Future: testimonial carousel + Review JSON-LD. Social proof for conversion. Consider AggregateRating schema.

videoTour.description: URL to a video tour (YouTube, Vimeo, etc.). Null if no video is available. Supports VideoObject structured data.
videoTour.x-notes: Future: embedded video player section + VideoObject JSON-LD. Null until video content is produced.

not-rendered-list: description — in interface, SEO uses tagline instead
coordinates — in interface, map uses exploreData.center
amenities[] — in interface, features[] is used for pills
lifestyleFeatures[] — not in interface, bonus JSON data
metrics[].numericValue — in interface, reserved for AnimatedCounter
metrics[].suffix — in interface, reserved for AnimatedCounter
qualityOfLife[].score — in interface, reserved for progress bars
qualityOfLife[].color — in interface, reserved for colored icons
schools[].students — bonus JSON, not in interface
schools[].highlight — bonus JSON, not in interface
restaurants[].location — bonus JSON, not in interface
restaurants[].priceRange — bonus JSON, not in interface
restaurants[].highlight — bonus JSON, not in interface
employers[].distance — bonus JSON, not in interface
airports.private.details — bonus JSON, not in interface
airports.commercial.details — bonus JSON, not in interface
keyDistances[].miles — bonus JSON, not in interface
--- Promoted from _future (44 fields across 14 top-level keys) ---
section — lifestyle category slug for filtering
priceRange — full price range with context
proximity.fashionSquare — drive time to Fashion Square
--- New enhancement fields (16 fields across 6 top-level keys) ---
faqs[].question — FAQ question for structured data
faqs[].answer — FAQ answer for structured data
recentSales[] — recent sold properties (8 fields each)
priceHistory[] — annual price/volume data (5 fields each)

x-conditional-sections.gallery: Hidden if gallery.length === 0 or gallery[0].url is falsy
x-conditional-sections.featured-listing: Hidden if listings.length === 0 or listings[0].img is falsy
x-conditional-sections.narrative-tabs: Only shown when narrative has 3+ paragraphs (split by \n\n)

x-icon-map.description: Valid icon names for qualityOfLife[].icon and signatureAmenity.icon
